---
name: Beta Bug Report
about: Report bugs found during the beta phase.
title: "[Beta Bug]: "
labels: ["beta", "type:bug", "status:needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

Describe what happened in 1 to 3 sentences.

## Expected Behavior

Describe what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

Describe what actually happened.

## Steps To Reproduce

1. 
2. 
3. 

## Frequency

- [ ] Every time
- [ ] Often
- [ ] Sometimes
- [ ] Happened once

## Impact

- [ ] Blocker (cannot continue)
- [ ] Major (core flow broken, workaround may exist)
- [ ] Minor (inconvenient but usable)
- [ ] Cosmetic (UI/text only)

## Environment

- Beta version/build:
- OS:
- Install type: (installer/zip/source)
- Console or GUI mode:

## Attachments

Add screenshots, logs, or short screen recordings when possible.

## Optional Context

- What were you trying to do?
- Any workaround discovered?
- Related issue links:

## Quick Help For Non-Technical Testers

If you are not sure what to write, copy this short format:

I clicked <button or action>. I expected <expected result>. Instead, <what happened>. This happens <frequency>. My version is <version> on <OS>.
